<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>For Kak — BTN JAKIM 2026</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,700;0,900;1,300;1,700;1,900&family=Barlow:wght@300;400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html,body{width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;background:#000;}

/* ── SLIDES CONTAINER ── */
#reel{
  display:flex;
  width:100vw;
  height:100vh;
  transition:transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.77,0,0.175,1);
  will-change:transform;
  cursor:grab;
}
#reel.dragging{cursor:grabbing;transition:none;}

/* ── EACH SLIDE ── */
.slide{
  flex:0 0 100vw;
  width:100vw;
  height:100vh;
  position:relative;
  overflow:hidden;
  background:#000;
  user-select:none;
}

/* ── PHOTO SLIDES ── */
.slide-photo .bg{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-size:cover;
  background-position:center;
  filter:grayscale(100%) contrast(1.08);
  transform:scale(1.06);
  transition:transform 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94);
}
.slide.active .slide-photo .bg,
.slide-photo.is-active .bg{transform:scale(1);}

/* dark overlay — different per slide for drama */
.slide-photo .overlay{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  pointer-events:none;
}

/* ── TEXT LAYERS ── */
.slide-photo .eyebrow{
  position:absolute;
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(10px,1.2vw,13px);
  font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:0.35em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
}
.slide-photo .headline{
  position:absolute;
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  font-weight:900;
  font-style:italic;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  line-height:0.92;
  color:#fff;
  font-size:clamp(72px,9vw,120px);
}
.slide-photo .sub{
  position:absolute;
  font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;
  font-weight:300;
  font-size:clamp(13px,1.4vw,17px);
  letter-spacing:0.06em;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
  line-height:1.6;
}
.slide-photo .stat{
  position:absolute;
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  font-weight:900;
  font-style:italic;
  font-size:clamp(48px,8vw,100px);
  color:#fff;
  line-height:1;
}
.slide-photo .stat-label{
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  font-weight:300;
  font-style:italic;
  font-size:clamp(14px,1.6vw,20px);
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  display:block;
  text-transform:uppercase;
}

/* ── SLIDE-SPECIFIC LAYOUTS ── */

/* S1 — full bleed portrait, text bottom-left */
#s1 .bg{background-image:url('data:image/png;base64,/9j/4AAQSkZJRgABAQAAAQABAAD/4gHYSUNDX1BST0ZJTEUAAQEAAAHIAAAAAAQwAABtbnRyUkdCIFhZWiAH4AABAAEAAAAAAABhY3NwAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAQAA9tYAAQAAAADTLQAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAlkZXNjAAAA8AAAACRyWFlaAAABFAAAABRnWFlaAAABKAAAABRiWFlaAAABPAAAABR3dHB0AAABUAAAABRyVFJDAAABZAAAAChnVFJDAAABZAAAAChiVFJDAAABZAAAAChjcHJ0AAABjAAAADxtbHVjAAAAAAAAAAEAAAAMZW5VUwAAAAgAAAAcAHMAUgBHAEJYWVogAAAAAAAAb6IAADj1AAADkFhZWiAAAAAAAABimQAAt4UAABjaWFlaIAAAAAAAACSgAAAPhAAAts9YWVogAAAAAAAA9tYAAQAAAADTLXBhcmEAAAAAAAQAAAACZmYAAPKnAAANWQAAE9AAAApbAAAAAAAAAABtbHVjAAAAAAAAAAEAAAAMZW5VUwAAACAAAAAcAEcAbwBvAGcAbABlACAASQBuAGMALgAgADIAMAAxADb/2wBDAAUDBAQEAwUEBAQFBQUGBwwIBwcHBw8LCwkMEQ8SEhEPERETFhwXExQaFRERGCEYGh0dHx8fExciJCIeJBweHx7/2wBDAQUFBQcGBw4ICA4eFBEUHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh4eHh7/wAARCArABgADASIAAhEBAxEB/8QAHQAAAgIDAQEBAAAAAAAAAAAAAAECAwQFBgcICf/EAFIQAAEDAgQEBAUBBgQDBwEBEQEAAhEDIQQSMUEFUWFxBhMigQcUMpGhsQgVI0JSwSQz0eFicvAWJTRDgqLxU5LCsrMmRGODFydUk6PiNXPD0v/EABUBAQEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAB/8QAFxEBAQEBAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAERQf/aAAwDAQACEQMRAD8A6nXUwi5ExKd0RfXqgBpcDkmE4tMa2REjTRAACyANeiYHJOCQgjEc9UxfT3Ce8hEd9UAB7Jiw0QBPsmNPwgAOalvtKPwmBy3QIAct0xzQ0W/1TAv31QIA736qQvKImE4lAaf2TiyIumO2iBCCb2T20R3KaBACUQeSYmY5I1ugQFjCOykB90RfVAgn3sj/AKlMduiBDrZMR2Rcb9E4KBQmgd095KBIi6lEaoAQIDmmPsnbdEGOqAA5DRH4REpgTpsgDqJR+qYCAgUXRedEyI3TI0KBDSE4QQnE6og5SmPsje4T2KKQBPIJ67IhOEEbIidkxfVEc0CAt/dSAQ0WKftZAapjsi6YHIygQCYHMIgJgSgQHRMDkiJT7hAjATibxCe6cCyBQhOE4M80CGqfdMWQgQUoumPsEDrqgQEhMc0BHWVAXQBbunHVMdlRH2T2TGpKYCBBA1shounAQIaShSEaIGslAuyYHJOEwLaII7JhOLphAhZHsnEo90CAhPZMC5QEBumO10e6aCKOSYugygVtQg3UglF0CiQgXTA6II0QIAbpgc0/wlEaXQIJ7TCBZMoElopAbI1QKEbJxZNAvZA7o30QbQgEwB7JwJTF0ERG6cdENCYQJEXkpiU+iBRZARCEDCcJ/qjVBGNwi0JiERdAk90DRCAGlkBEJxI7IEOoQEwPsmRa/wB0C1nROEAc0wASgWpUt0AbpjSEABfRI66KQ5Ij8IIQiJEwnF76I7oAW2TjtCZHVAFtLoIQn7QpRJvYaIA0QKJPJF9lK0T7I5IEBedkQpWi/ZCCMJwQgd00CgaaJ76IiTAQO6BBMckDS6BdARAQU4mE9EQgE4lH 20%;}
#s1 .overlay{background:linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.7) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 60%);}
#s1 .eyebrow{bottom:clamp(170px,22vh,240px);left:clamp(32px,5vw,80px);}
#s1 .headline{bottom:clamp(80px,10vh,120px);left:clamp(48px,4vw,70px);max-width:70vw;}
#s1 .sub{bottom:clamp(36px,4vh,60px);left:clamp(32px,5vw,80px);}

#s2 .overlay{background:linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.55) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0.3) 100%);}
#s2 .headline{top:clamp(40px,8vh,100px);right:clamp(32px,5vw,80px);text-align:right;font-size:clamp(64px,7vw,96px);}
#s2 .sub{bottom:clamp(36px,4vh,60px);right:clamp(32px,5vw,80px);text-align:right;}

#s3 .overlay{background:linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 40%, rgba(0,0,0,0.65) 100%);}
#s3 .headline{top:clamp(40px,7vh,80px);left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;font-size:clamp(60px,6vw,80px);}
#s3 .sub{bottom:clamp(36px,5vh,70px);left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;}

50%;filter:grayscale(100%) contrast(1.1);}
#s4 .overlay{background:linear-gradient(to right, rgba(0,0,0,0.75) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 60%);}
#s4 .eyebrow{top:clamp(40px,7vh,80px);left:clamp(32px,5vw,80px);}
#s4 .stat{top:50%;left:clamp(32px,5vw,80px);transform:translateY(-50%);}
#s4 .sub{bottom:clamp(36px,4vh,60px);left:clamp(32px,5vw,80px);max-width:40vw;}

/* S5 — stretch pose, diagonal crop feel */

40%;}
#s5 .overlay{background:linear-gradient(to top-left, rgba(0,0,0,0.8) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 60%);}
#s5 .headline{bottom:clamp(100px,14vh,160px);right:clamp(52px,5vw,80px);text-align:right;font-size:clamp(40px,6vw,80px);}
#s5 .sub{bottom:clamp(36px,4vh,60px);right:clamp(32px,5vw,80px);text-align:right;}

/* S6 — medal hero */

50%;}
#s6 .overlay{background:linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.8) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.2) 55%, rgba(0,0,0,0.5) 100%);}
#s6 .eyebrow{bottom:clamp(220px,28vh,300px);left:clamp(32px,5vw,80px);}
#s6 .headline{bottom:clamp(110px,14vh,160px);left:clamp(28px,4vw,70px);font-size:clamp(82px,8.5vw,110px);}
#s6 .sub{bottom:clamp(40px,5vh,72px);left:clamp(32px,5vw,80px);max-width:55vw;}

/* ── ENVELOPE SLIDE ── */
#s7{
  background:#000;
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:column;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  gap:0;
}
.env-eyebrow{
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(10px,1.1vw,13px);
  font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:0.4em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.28);
  margin-bottom:clamp(24px,4vh,48px);
}

/* envelope */
.env-wrap{
  position:relative;
  cursor:pointer;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 0 40px rgba(192,57,43,0.35));
  transition:transform 0.35s ease, filter 0.35s ease;
  width:clamp(180px,22vw,280px);
}
.env-wrap:hover{
  transform:scale(1.05) translateY(-6px);
  filter:drop-shadow(0 0 60px rgba(220,60,45,0.55));
}
.env-wrap.opened{pointer-events:none;}

.env-svg{display:block;width:100%;}

/* flap */
.env-flap{
  transform-origin:top center;
  transition:transform 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
}
.env-wrap.opened .env-flap{transform:rotateX(180deg) scaleY(-1);}

/* letter peek */
.letter-peek{
  position:absolute;
  bottom:18%;left:50%;
  transform:translateX(-50%);
  width:78%;
  background:#fffdf8;
  border-radius:3px 3px 2px 2px;
  padding:8px 10px 10px;
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  font-style:italic;
  font-size:clamp(9px,1vw,12px);
  color:#333;
  line-height:1.4;
  opacity:0;
  transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0px);
  transition:
    opacity 0.5s ease 0.4s,
    transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) 0.35s;
  pointer-events:none;
  z-index:2;
  white-space:nowrap;
  overflow:hidden;
  text-overflow:ellipsis;
}
.env-wrap.opened .letter-peek{
  opacity:1;
  transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(-70px);
}

.env-cta{
  margin-top:clamp(20px,3vh,36px);
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(11px,1.2vw,14px);
  letter-spacing:0.3em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  transition:opacity 0.4s;
}
.env-wrap.opened ~ .env-cta{opacity:0;}

/* ── LETTER MODAL ── */
.modal-bg{
  position:fixed;inset:0;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,0.82);
  z-index:200;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  padding:24px;
  opacity:0;pointer-events:none;
  transition:opacity 0.4s ease;
  backdrop-filter:blur(4px);
}
.modal-bg.on{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;}

.modal{
  background:#fff;
  max-width:540px;width:100%;
  max-height:85vh;
  overflow-y:auto;
  border-radius:2px;
  padding:clamp(28px,5vw,56px);
  position:relative;
  transform:translateY(50px) scale(0.95);
  transition:transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) 0.08s;
}
.modal-bg.on .modal{transform:translateY(0) scale(1);}

.modal-close{
  position:absolute;top:16px;right:20px;
  background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;
  font-size:20px;color:#999;
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  font-weight:300;letter-spacing:0.1em;
  transition:color 0.2s;
}
.modal-close:hover{color:#222;}

.modal h2{
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  font-weight:900;font-style:italic;
  font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,48px);
  text-transform:uppercase;
  color:#111;line-height:1;
  margin-bottom:8px;
}
.modal .kicker{
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  font-size:11px;font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:0.35em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:#c0392b;margin-bottom:24px;display:block;
}
.modal-body{
  font-family:'Barlow',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(14px,1.5vw,17px);
  line-height:1.75;
  color:#333;
  white-space:pre-wrap;
}
.modal-sign{
  margin-top:28px;
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  font-weight:700;font-style:italic;
  font-size:clamp(20px,2.5vw,28px);
  color:#111;text-align:right;
}

/* ── PROGRESS DOTS ── */
#dots{
  position:fixed;
  right:clamp(16px,2.5vw,32px);
  top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;
  z-index:50;
}
.dot{
  width:6px;height:6px;
  border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
  transition:all 0.35s ease;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.dot.active{
  background:#fff;
  height:24px;border-radius:3px;
}
#dots .dot.env-dot.active{background:#c0392b;}

/* ── SLIDE INDEX ── */
.slide-num{
  position:absolute;
  bottom:clamp(36px,4vh,60px);
  right:clamp(32px,5vw,80px);
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  font-size:11px;font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:0.25em;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.28);
}

/* ── SWIPE HINT (first load) ── */
#swipe-hint{
  position:fixed;
  bottom:clamp(20px,3vh,36px);
  left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  z-index:60;
  font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;
  font-size:11px;font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:0.3em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
  transition:opacity 0.5s;
}
#swipe-hint.gone{opacity:0;pointer-events:none;}
.hint-arrow{
  display:inline-block;
  animation:nudge 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes nudge{
  0%,100%{transform:translateX(0);}
  50%{transform:translateX(8px);}
}

/* ── ENTRY ANIMATION ── */
.slide-photo .headline,
.slide-photo .eyebrow,
.slide-photo .sub,
.slide-photo .stat{
  opacity:0;
  transform:translateY(18px);
  transition:
    opacity 0.7s ease,
    transform 0.7s ease;
}
.slide.active .slide-photo .headline{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);transition-delay:0.15s;}
.slide.active .slide-photo .eyebrow{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);transition-delay:0.05s;}
.slide.active .slide-photo .sub{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);transition-delay:0.28s;}
.slide.active .slide-photo .stat{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);transition-delay:0.1s;}

/* ── PETALS ── */
#petals{position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:300;overflow:hidden;display:none;}
.petal{position:absolute;top:-30px;animation:fall linear forwards;}
@keyframes fall{to{transform:translateY(110vh) rotate(360deg);opacity:0;}}

@media(max-width:600px){
  #s3 .headline{white-space:normal;text-align:center;width:90vw;}
  #s3 .sub{white-space:normal;width:80vw;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- SLIDES -->
<div id="reel">

  <!-- S1: City Skyline Stand -->
  <div class="slide" id="s1">
    <div class="slide-photo">
      <div class="bg"></div>
      <div class="overlay"></div>
      <div class="eyebrow">BTN Jakarta International Marathon 2026</div>
      <div class="headline">She<br>Showed<br>Up.</div>
      <div class="sub">Before the race. Before the world knew her name.</div>
      <div class="slide-num">01 / 06</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- S2: Close-up after finish -->
  <div class="slide" id="s2">
    <div class="slide-photo">
      <div class="bg"></div>
      <div class="overlay"></div>
      <div class="headline">Eyes<br>On<br>The<br>Line.</div>
      <div class="sub">At the finish. Drenched. Unbroken.</div>
      <div class="slide-num">02 / 06</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- S3: Tunnel run -->
  <div class="slide" id="s3">
    <div class="slide-photo">
      <div class="bg"></div>
      <div class="overlay"></div>
      <div class="headline">Keep<br>Moving<br>Forward.</div>
      <div class="sub">Through every tunnel. Every doubt. Every km.</div>
      <div class="slide-num">03 / 06</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- S4: Duo stretch -->
  <div class="slide" id="s4">
    <div class="slide-photo">
      <div class="bg"></div>
      <div class="overlay"></div>
      <div class="eyebrow">Half Marathon — 21.1 km</div>
      <div class="stat">21.1<span class="stat-label">km completed</span></div>
      <div class="sub">Every metre earned.<br>None of them wasted.</div>
      <div class="slide-num">04 / 06</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- S5: Stretch solo -->
  <div class="slide" id="s5">
    <div class="slide-photo">
      <div class="bg"></div>
      <div class="overlay"></div>
      <div class="headline">The<br>Work<br>Was<br>Real.</div>
      <div class="sub">Hours of training nobody filmed.</div>
      <div class="slide-num">05 / 06</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- S6: Medal -->
  <div class="slide" id="s6">
    <div class="slide-photo">
      <div class="bg"></div>
      <div class="overlay"></div>
      <div class="eyebrow">Finisher — BTN JAKIM 2026</div>
      <div class="headline">She<br>Earned<br>This.</div>
      <div class="sub">And I am so, so proud of you.</div>
      <div class="slide-num">06 / 06</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- S7: Envelope -->
  <div class="slide" id="s7">
    <p class="env-eyebrow">Something for you</p>

    <div class="env-wrap" id="envelope" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-label="Open envelope">
      <svg class="env-svg" viewBox="0 0 240 168" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <rect x="0" y="24" width="240" height="144" rx="6" fill="#b03020"/>
        <polygon points="0,24 240,24 120,102" fill="#c0392b"/>
        <!-- left shadow -->
        <polygon points="0,24 120,102 0,168" fill="#922b21"/>
        <!-- right shadow -->
        <polygon points="240,24 120,102 240,168" fill="#922b21"/>
        <!-- bottom fold -->
        <polygon points="0,168 120,108 240,168" fill="#7b2318"/>
        <!-- flap -->
        <g class="env-flap">
          <polygon points="0,24 240,24 120,102" fill="#e74c3c"/>
        </g>
      </svg>
      <div class="letter-peek" id="letter-peek">Click the envelope icon to open the message</div>
    </div>

    <p class="env-cta">tap to open &#9825;</p>
  </div>

</div><!-- /reel -->

<!-- DOTS -->
<nav id="dots" aria-label="Slide navigation">
  <div class="dot active" data-i="0"></div>
  <div class="dot" data-i="1"></div>
  <div class="dot" data-i="2"></div>
  <div class="dot" data-i="3"></div>
  <div class="dot" data-i="4"></div>
  <div class="dot" data-i="5"></div>
  <div class="dot env-dot" data-i="6"></div>
</nav>

<!-- SWIPE HINT -->
<div id="swipe-hint">
  <span>Swipe</span>
  <span class="hint-arrow">&#8594;</span>
</div>

<!-- MODAL -->
<div class="modal-bg" id="modal-bg" role="dialog" aria-modal="true">
  <div class="modal" id="modal">
    <button class="modal-close" id="modal-close">&#10005; Close</button>
    <h2 id="modal-title">Untuk Kak,</h2>
    <span class="kicker">BTN JAKIM Half Marathon 2026 &#8212; Finisher</span>
    <div class="modal-body" id="modal-body"></div>
    <p class="modal-sign" id="modal-sign"></p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PETALS -->
<div id="petals"></div>

<script>
// ─────────────────────────────────────
// ✏️  YOUR MESSAGE — edit here
// ─────────────────────────────────────
const SALUTATION   = "Bels,";
const KICKER       = "BTN JAKIM Half Marathon 2026 — Finisher";
const MESSAGE      = `Huge congratulations on conquering the BTN JAKIM Half Marathon, Bels! 🏅

Bels, I was with you in spirit every step of the way today. Watching you take on this challenge was incredible, even from afar. I know how insanely packed your work schedule has been, and the fact that you still showed up and pushed through—even with only a week to prepare—blows my mind. I am watching you grow and become better, stronger, and more resilient day after day. I’m sorry I couldn't be there to cheer you on in person, but please know how happy I am and how incredibly proud I am of you.

Congratulations Beatrice Amabella Utari 🫶✨`;
const SIGN         = "— Pesi";
// ─────────────────────────────────────

const TOTAL = 7;
let cur = 0;
let dragging = false, startX = 0, diffX = 0;

const reel = document.getElementById('reel');
const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slide');
const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.dot');
const hint = document.getElementById('swipe-hint');
let hintGone = false;

function goTo(idx, instant) {
  if (idx < 0 || idx >= TOTAL) return;
  cur = idx;
  reel.style.transition = instant ? 'none' : 'transform 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.77,0,0.175,1)';
  reel.style.transform = `translateX(${-cur * 100}vw)`;
  slides.forEach((s,i) => s.classList.toggle('active', i === cur));
  dots.forEach((d,i) => d.classList.toggle('active', i === cur));
  if (!hintGone && cur > 0) { hint.classList.add('gone'); hintGone = true; }
}

// init first slide active
slides[0].classList.add('active');

// background images — already in CSS but trigger bg-scale on active
// (handled via .active class on .slide → .slide-photo .bg transition)

// dots click
dots.forEach(d => d.addEventListener('click', () => goTo(+d.dataset.i)));

// keyboard
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'ArrowDown') goTo(cur + 1);
  if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft'  || e.key === 'ArrowUp')   goTo(cur - 1);
});

// mouse drag
reel.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
  dragging = true; startX = e.clientX; diffX = 0;
  reel.classList.add('dragging');
});
window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  if (!dragging) return;
  diffX = e.clientX - startX;
  reel.style.transition = 'none';
  reel.style.transform = `translateX(calc(${-cur * 100}vw + ${diffX}px))`;
});
window.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
  if (!dragging) return;
  dragging = false;
  reel.classList.remove('dragging');
  if (diffX < -60) goTo(cur + 1);
  else if (diffX > 60) goTo(cur - 1);
  else goTo(cur);
});

// touch
let touchStartX = 0, touchDiffX = 0;
reel.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
  touchStartX = e.touches[0].clientX;
  touchDiffX = 0;
}, {passive:true});
reel.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
  touchDiffX = e.touches[0].clientX - touchStartX;
  reel.style.transition = 'none';
  reel.style.transform = `translateX(calc(${-cur * 100}vw + ${touchDiffX}px))`;
}, {passive:true});
reel.addEventListener('touchend', () => {
  if (touchDiffX < -50) goTo(cur + 1);
  else if (touchDiffX > 50) goTo(cur - 1);
  else goTo(cur);
});

// ── ENVELOPE ──
const env = document.getElementById('envelope');
const modalBg = document.getElementById('modal-bg');
let opened = false;

document.getElementById('modal-title').textContent = SALUTATION;
document.getElementById('modal-body').textContent = MESSAGE;
document.getElementById('modal-sign').textContent = SIGN;

function openEnv() {
  if (opened) return;
  opened = true;
  env.classList.add('opened');
  setTimeout(() => {
    modalBg.classList.add('on');
    document.getElementById('modal-close').focus();
    launchPetals();
  }, 950);
}

env.addEventListener('click', openEnv);
env.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key==='Enter'||e.key===' ') openEnv(); });

function closeModal() { modalBg.classList.remove('on'); }
document.getElementById('modal-close').addEventListener('click', closeModal);
modalBg.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target===modalBg) closeModal(); });
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key==='Escape') closeModal(); });

// ── PETALS ──
function launchPetals() {
  const p = document.getElementById('petals');
  p.style.display = 'block';
  const s = ['🌸','🌺','🎉','✨','💪','🏅','❤'];
  let n = 0;
  const iv = setInterval(() => {
    if (n++ > 30) { clearInterval(iv); setTimeout(() => p.style.display='none', 4000); return; }
    const el = document.createElement('span');
    el.className = 'petal';
    el.textContent = s[Math.floor(Math.random()*s.length)];
    el.style.cssText = `left:${Math.random()*100}vw;font-size:${1+Math.random()*1.2}rem;animation-duration:${2.5+Math.random()*2.5}s;animation-delay:${Math.random()*1.2}s`;
    p.appendChild(el);
    el.addEventListener('animationend', () => el.remove());
  }, 90);
}

goTo(0, true);
</script>
</body>
</html>
